headline: 1 Services Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Business services providers thrive by solving complex operational challenges for their clients, allowing them to focus on their secret sauce. Market leaders have certainly capitalized on outsourcing trends and digital transformation initiatives to boost sales, helping fuel a 7.7% gain for the industry over the past six months. This performance has closely followed the S&P 500.
